'''thakasa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:xylate|xylate]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-k-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xylate|xylate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| thakasa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thækæsæth|thækæsæth]] || [[word:thækæsæj|thækæsæj]] || [[word:thækæsæsh|thækæsæsh]] || [[word:thækæsæ|thækæsæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thakakasath|thakakasath]] || [[word:thakakasaj|thakakasaj]] || [[word:thakakasash|thakakasash]] || [[word:thakakasa|thakakasa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thakasath|thakasath]] || [[word:thakasaj|thakasaj]] || [[word:thakasash|thakasash]] || [[word:thakasa|thakasa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thakafsath|thakafsath]] || [[word:thakafsaj|thakafsaj]] || [[word:thakafsash|thakafsash]] || [[word:thakafsaf|thakafsaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:thakasatha|thakasatha]] || [[word:thakasaja|thakasaja]] || [[word:thakasasha|thakasasha]] || [[word:thakasaka|thakasaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:thakasath|thakasath]] || [[word:thakasaj|thakasaj]] || [[word:thakasash|thakasash]] || [[word:thakasa|thakasa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:thakasathal|thakasathal]] || [[word:thakasajal|thakasajal]] || [[word:thakasashal|thakasashal]] || [[word:thakasakal|thakasakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:thakasathatha|thakasathatha]] || [[word:thakasajaja|thakasajaja]] || [[word:thakasashasha|thakasashasha]] || [[word:thakasaka|thakasaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:thakasathan|thakasathan]] || [[word:thakasajan|thakasajan]] || [[word:thakasashan|thakasashan]] || [[word:thakasakan|thakasakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:thakasathaoro|thakasathaoro]] || [[word:thakasajaoro|thakasajaoro]] || [[word:thakasashaoro|thakasashaoro]] || [[word:thakasakaoro|thakasakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|92df33c}}
